Who We Are

Pune's Home for Equestrian Excellence

DCB Horse Riding Club is Yewalewadi's premier riding school — where beginners discover their confidence and experienced riders reach new heights. Our thoroughbred herd, certified instructors, and natural open grounds make every session unforgettable.

Whether you're 6 or 60, a first-timer or a competitor, there's a place for you here at DCB.

🏆 Coach: Mr. Gajanan 🐴 9 Thoroughbreds 🌿 Natural Grounds 👨‍👩‍👧 All Ages 📚 Equine Care Classes ⛔ Closed Fridays
What We Offer

Programs for Every Level

🌱
Beginner
Introduction & Trot

From zero to confident trot and canter — we guide you every step of the way.

  • Horse familiarisation & grooming
  • Walk, trot & first canter
  • Balance, position & rein aids
  • Stable safety & etiquette
🏇
Advanced
Jumping & Dressage

Technical precision and show-ring confidence with our advanced training programme.

  • Show jumping up to 80 cm+
  • Collection & flying changes
  • Gymnastic grids & course work
  • Competition preparation
🌾
Horsemanship
Equine Care

Beyond the saddle — learn feeding, grooming, health and stable management.

  • Feeding & nutrition
  • Grooming & hoof care
  • Tack fitting & maintenance
  • Health & first aid basics
🏠
Livery
Horse Boarding

Board your horse with us and let our team handle the daily care.

  • Full board & DIY options
  • Daily schooling available
  • Farrier & vet coordination
  • Show preparation support
Horse Boarding

Complete Care Livery

When you're not here, we are. Our Complete Care Livery means your horse is fed, groomed, exercised and loved every day by our dedicated team.

Choose from full board, training board, or DIY livery — flexible and always personal.

  • Spacious loose box stabling
  • Daily feeding & fresh water
  • Twice-daily stable maintenance
  • Grooming, bathing & coat care
  • Daily turnout & paddock time
  • Optional daily professional schooling
  • Farrier & veterinary coordination
  • Tack & equipment storage
  • Monthly health & progress reports

Ready to Board?

Tell us about your horse and we'll create a personalised care plan for your schedule.

  • Full Board — everything handled for you
  • Board + Training — daily professional schooling
  • DIY Livery — stable & facilities, you manage care

What Riders Say

Real Reviews from Google

4.9
★★★★★
Google Reviews
89+ ratings · Pune
"
★★★★★

Mr. Gajanan is an amazing coach — his attention to detail and focus on safety is unlike any other riding school I've been to. My daughter was nervous on day one, but within three sessions she was trotting on her own and beaming with pride. The horses are so well looked after and clearly loved. This place has completely changed our weekends — we genuinely look forward to every single visit.

P
Priya S.
G Google Review · Verified
"
★★★★★

One of the best decisions we've made as a family. Both my kids (ages 7 and 10) are enrolled here and the transformation is unbelievable — more confident, more disciplined, and so much more responsible. Mr. Gajanan ensures both horses and students are cared for with equal dedication. No other club in Pune comes close to this level of personal attention.

A
Amit D.
G Google Review · Verified
"
★★★★★

I came as a complete beginner, genuinely terrified of horses. The team was so patient and never made me feel rushed. Within a month I was cantering. The stable is clean, the horses are happy, and the whole environment feels safe and welcoming. My only regret is not starting sooner. If you're on the fence, just book one trial session — it will change your mind completely.

R
Rohini T.
G Google Review · Verified
"
★★★★★

I've been riding at various clubs in Pune for five years and DCB is hands-down the best. The thoroughbreds are magnificent — you can see how well they're trained and cared for. The instruction is technically sound and genuinely effective. I've improved more in six months here than in the years before. What makes it special is the passion — everyone here truly loves horses, and that energy is contagious.

S
Siddharth K.
G Google Review · Verified
"
★★★★★

We brought the whole family — kids, parents, grandparents — for a Sunday morning session. It was the most memorable day we've had together in years. Every member, from our 5-year-old to my 68-year-old father, was handled with such care and patience. The setting at Yewalewadi is beautiful in the early morning light. DCB isn't just a riding club — it's an experience that stays with you.

N
Neha M.
G Google Review · Verified
"
★★★★★

My horse has been boarded here for almost a year and the care she receives is exceptional. Every day she is groomed, exercised and given real attention. I travel frequently and knowing she's in such loving, capable hands gives me complete peace of mind. The team updates me regularly and is always available. DCB is not just a livery — it's a second home for my horse, and I am so grateful.

V
Vikram P.
G Google Review · Livery Owner
